name: Slushie Entertainment! (SE series)
description:
Hello!

"Welcome to Slushie Entertainment Waterpark and Rides, the greatest waterpark in America! I am Faraday Williams and I am proud to present to you a waterpark the likes you have never seen! Come play on our many water themed rides, but be careful not to run or you might get hurt! Its fun for the whole family! And if you tired of getting soaked, come try one of our many entertainment venues and attractions where we have something for everyone!"

"And walking around our park is our many friendly animatronics. Each one is ultra friendly and they all love to meet a fan or two. All of our animatronics are programmed with the latest of child protection software so you will be safe in their hands! Let me introduce you to the main cast:"

Slushie the Otter

link: https://janitorai.com/characters/286f8c5b-8cf9-45a3-bfe9-5da6ebb3f1d7_character-slushie-the-otter-se-series
